markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss GrowthX's scaling needs and Anthropic's partnership programs.](https://fathom.video/share/rPbY8LRnjgozLXzwzzq5icLXFfd-zazr?tab=summary&timestamp=284.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Scaling Bottlenecks:** GrowthX's rapid growth is hitting rate limits on Claude 4.5, creating unpredictable costs and scaling risks.](https://fathom.video/share/rPbY8LRnjgozLXzwzzq5icLXFfd-zazr?tab=summary&timestamp=310.0)
  - [**Enterprise Plan:** A migration to the Enterprise plan ($20/seat + pay-as-you-go tokens) was proposed to replace the current Teams plan, which has rigid usage caps.](https://fathom.video/share/rPbY8LRnjgozLXzwzzq5icLXFfd-zazr?tab=summary&timestamp=676.0)
  - [**Commercial Agreement:** A formal agreement is required to secure reserved capacity and volume discounts, contingent on GrowthX providing a 12-month consumption forecast.](https://fathom.video/share/rPbY8LRnjgozLXzwzzq5icLXFfd-zazr?tab=summary&timestamp=932.0)
  - [**Partnership:** GrowthX will provide model feedback (e.g., on Sonnet 4.6) in exchange for Anthropic's technical support to optimize Claude usage.](https://fathom.video/share/rPbY8LRnjgozLXzwzzq5icLXFfd-zazr?tab=summary&timestamp=1091.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX's Scaling Challenges

  - [**Problem:** GrowthX's rapid growth is hitting rate limits on Claude 4.5, creating unpredictable costs and scaling risks.](https://fathom.video/share/rPbY8LRnjgozLXzwzzq5icLXFfd-zazr?tab=summary&timestamp=310.0)
  - [**Needs:**](https://fathom.video/share/rPbY8LRnjgozLXzwzzq5icLXFfd-zazr?tab=summary&timestamp=310.0)
      - [Predictable billing (monthly invoicing).](https://fathom.video/share/rPbY8LRnjgozLXzwzzq5icLXFfd-zazr?tab=summary&timestamp=531.0)
      - [Higher rate limits and credit reloads.](https://fathom.video/share/rPbY8LRnjgozLXzwzzq5icLXFfd-zazr?tab=summary&timestamp=310.0)
      - [A clear, predictable migration path to an Enterprise plan.](https://fathom.video/share/rPbY8LRnjgozLXzwzzq5icLXFfd-zazr?tab=summary&timestamp=434.0)
  - [**Context:** GrowthX is an AI-native company building production applications on Anthropic, making a stable, scalable partnership critical.](https://fathom.video/share/rPbY8LRnjgozLXzwzzq5icLXFfd-zazr?tab=summary&timestamp=459.0)

### Proposed Solution: Enterprise Plan Migration

  - [**Proposal:** Migrate from the current Teams plan to the Enterprise plan.](https://fathom.video/share/rPbY8LRnjgozLXzwzzq5icLXFfd-zazr?tab=summary&timestamp=555.0)
  - [**Rationale:** The Teams plan's rigid usage caps create overhead and are not suitable for high-growth companies.](https://fathom.video/share/rPbY8LRnjgozLXzwzzq5icLXFfd-zazr?tab=summary&timestamp=774.0)
  - [**Enterprise Plan Details:**](https://fathom.video/share/rPbY8LRnjgozLXzwzzq5icLXFfd-zazr?tab=summary&timestamp=676.0)
      - [**Cost:** $20/seat (annual plan), comparable to Teams.](https://fathom.video/share/rPbY8LRnjgozLXzwzzq5icLXFfd-zazr?tab=summary&timestamp=705.0)
      - [**Usage:** Pay-as-you-go for tokens at standard API rates.](https://fathom.video/share/rPbY8LRnjgozLXzwzzq5icLXFfd-zazr?tab=summary&timestamp=705.0)
      - [**Benefits:**](https://fathom.video/share/rPbY8LRnjgozLXzwzzq5icLXFfd-zazr?tab=summary&timestamp=662.0)
          - [**Predictability:** Replaces usage caps with a transparent, pay-as-you-go model.](https://fathom.video/share/rPbY8LRnjgozLXzwzzq5icLXFfd-zazr?tab=summary&timestamp=676.0)
          - [**Control:** Provides user-level cost visibility and the ability to set individual or group usage caps.](https://fathom.video/share/rPbY8LRnjgozLXzwzzq5icLXFfd-zazr?tab=summary&timestamp=761.0)
          - [**Upgrade Path:** A true upgrade; no user experience or limit downgrades.](https://fathom.video/share/rPbY8LRnjgozLXzwzzq5icLXFfd-zazr?tab=summary&timestamp=662.0)
  - [**Action:** John will research the migration process and address a specific question from Yusef about user tiers.](https://fathom.video/share/rPbY8LRnjgozLXzwzzq5icLXFfd-zazr?tab=summary&timestamp=555.0)

### Long-Term Solution: Commercial Agreement

  - [**Purpose:** Secure reserved capacity and volume discounts for GrowthX's long-term growth.](https://fathom.video/share/rPbY8LRnjgozLXzwzzq5icLXFfd-zazr?tab=summary&timestamp=932.0)
  - [**Requirement:** A formal commercial agreement, which requires a 12-month consumption forecast from GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/rPbY8LRnjgozLXzwzzq5icLXFfd-zazr?tab=summary&timestamp=932.0)
  - [**Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/rPbY8LRnjgozLXzwzzq5icLXFfd-zazr?tab=summary&timestamp=932.0)
    1.  [GrowthX provides a 12-month consumption forecast.](https://fathom.video/share/rPbY8LRnjgozLXzwzzq5icLXFfd-zazr?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)
    2.  [Anthropic uses the forecast to create a formal proposal.](https://fathom.video/share/rPbY8LRnjgozLXzwzzq5icLXFfd-zazr?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)

### Partnership & Feedback Loop

  - [**Goal:** Establish a two-way partnership for mutual benefit.](https://fathom.video/share/rPbY8LRnjgozLXzwzzq5icLXFfd-zazr?tab=summary&timestamp=1369.0)
  - [**GrowthX's Contribution:** Provide feedback on Claude's performance (e.g., Sonnet 4.6) and comparative data against other providers.](https://fathom.video/share/rPbY8LRnjgozLXzwzzq5icLXFfd-zazr?tab=summary&timestamp=1237.0)
  - [**Anthropic's Contribution:** Offer technical support (e.g., prompt engineering) to help GrowthX optimize Claude usage and win new workloads.](https://fathom.video/share/rPbY8LRnjgozLXzwzzq5icLXFfd-zazr?tab=summary&timestamp=1269.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**John (Anthropic):**](https://fathom.video/share/rPbY8LRnjgozLXzwzzq5icLXFfd-zazr?tab=summary&timestamp=1395.0)
      - [Research and share the process for monthly invoice billing.](https://fathom.video/share/rPbY8LRnjgozLXzwzzq5icLXFfd-zazr?tab=summary&timestamp=531.0)
      - [Research and share the Teams-to-Enterprise migration path, including Yusef's specific question.](https://fathom.video/share/rPbY8LRnjgozLXzwzzq5icLXFfd-zazr?tab=summary&timestamp=555.0)
      - [Post a meeting summary in the shared Slack channel.](https://fathom.video/share/rPbY8LRnjgozLXzwzzq5icLXFfd-zazr?tab=summary&timestamp=1510.0)
  - [**Leo (GrowthX):**](https://fathom.video/share/rPbY8LRnjgozLXzwzzq5icLXFfd-zazr?tab=summary&timestamp=1395.0)
      - [Provide a 12-month consumption forecast to enable a commercial agreement proposal.](https://fathom.video/share/rPbY8LRnjgozLXzwzzq5icLXFfd-zazr?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)
      - [Gather and share model feedback from the team, especially on Sonnet 4.6.](https://fathom.video/share/rPbY8LRnjgozLXzwzzq5icLXFfd-zazr?tab=summary&timestamp=1407.0)
